meaning: adj.眼睛的,视觉的n.目镜,眼睛
examples: Other ocular signs include involuntary rhythmic movement of the eyeball.
We will present an ocular demonstration.
Subconjunctival hemorrhages are very common ocular findings.
The drug, Zioptan, treats elevated intraocular pressure in people with a form of glaucoma or ocular hypertension.
One problem, though: Not everyone is convinced ocular dominance is a real phenomenon.
